values.option: Do not allow your ship to be repaired by others.
Allow your ship to be repaired by other legion members.
Ship Buff Expirations Alert when a temporary buff expires
Item Cooldowns Alert when a ship item cooldown is ready
Player Timers Alert when invasion, scan share, evolution genes, daily reward, supporter bonus become available
Browser Notifications Also send browser push notifications when alerted for any above (works in background tabs)
Refreshed Solid embossed buttons with more classic colors
Neon Outlined buttons with glowing borders and dark scifi features
Alternate Alternate character art with multiple variants per race (chosen during race selection)
